ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock symbol */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time of the price data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded on the given date */,
  "adj_open_price" REAL /* Adjusted opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "adj_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "adj_high_price" REAL /* Adjusted highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "adj_low_price" REAL /* Adjusted lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol (e.g., AAPL, GOOGL) */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the company (e.g., Technology, Finance) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company (e.g., Software, Banking) */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the company is listed (e.g., NASDAQ, NYSE) */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial public offering date */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is headquartered */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., retail investor, institutional investor, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_stocks" (
  "user_stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-stock relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user following the stock */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being followed */,
  "follow_date" TEXT /* Date when the user started following the stock */,
  "notification_preferences" TEXT /* Notification preferences for the user (e.g., daily, weekly, never) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_stocks_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_stocks_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user setting the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the alert is set for */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price, volume) */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Threshold value that triggers the alert */,
  "alert_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the alert (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the alert was created */,
  "last_sent_at" TEXT /* Date and time the alert was last sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the report is about */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily summary, weekly summary) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report file */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the news article is about */,
  "article_title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "article_text" TEXT /* Text of the news article */,
  "article_date" TEXT /* Date and time the news article was published */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_splits" (
  "split_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock split */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock that split */,
  "split_date" TEXT /* Date of the stock split */,
  "split_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of the stock split (e.g., 2-for-1, 3-for-2) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("split_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_splits_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dividends" (
  "dividend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dividend */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock that paid the dividend */,
  "dividend_date" TEXT /* Date of the dividend payment */,
  "dividend_amount" REAL /* Amount of the dividend payment */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the dividend payment (e.g., quarterly, annually) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dividend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dividends_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "insider_trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each insider trade */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock traded by the insider */,
  "insider_name" TEXT /* Name of the insider */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the insider trade */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "number_of_shares" INTEGER /* Number of shares traded */,
  "trade_value" REAL /* Value of the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_insider_trades_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
